title: More C418 Music Pack
description: A pack that adds more songs by C418 from outside of Minecraft!
body:
Additional songs by C418 that I thought would fit the vibe of Minecraft! Adds music to: the general music set (all versions), biome-specific music sets (Rev 2 and onwards), Creative mode (Rev 3 and onwards), menu (Rev 3 and onwards). Small note: When I add a new version, I usually only add the latest game update because that's the only version I test it on, but I highly advise you to test if the pack works on your version if you're playing an older one!!

Playlist with all the songs: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDWcdFcjJkvr8wFxywm7g2WICQYSaNY2X&si=uJLKUfF3cvHDaX8X
C418's Bandcamp page!: https://c418.bandcamp.com
